attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          ,
 NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 NBM.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 NBM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
 NBM.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
 NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
 NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NBM.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
 NBM.TRANSACTION_DATETIME          ,
 NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 NBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
 NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         ,
 NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
 NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
 NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       ,
 NBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
 NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
 NBM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        ,
 NBM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE           ,
 NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE               ,
 NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
 NBM.CANCELLED_FLG                 ,
 NBM.CANCEL_CODE                   ,
 NBM.ACQUISITION_FLG               ,
 NBM.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           ,
 NBM.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        ,
 NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        ,
 NBM.OVERLAY_FLG                   ,
 NBM.IC_REVENUE_FLG                ,
 NBM.CHARGES_FLG                   ,
 NBM.SALESREP_FLG                  ,
 NBM.MISC_FLG                      ,
 NBM.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
 NBM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        ,
 NBM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          ,
 NBM.REVENUE_FLG                   ,
 NBM.RMA_FLG                       ,
 NBM.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE                  ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE   ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE        ,
 NBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE          ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE   ,
 NBM.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE     ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE ,
 NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        ,
 NBM.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 NBM.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 NBM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
 NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
 NBM.CONVERSION_RT                 ,
 NBM.CONVERSION_DT                 ,
 NBM.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           ,
 NBM.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM           ,
 NBM.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE  ,
 NBM.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  ,
 NBM.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            ,
 NBM.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           ,
 NBM.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          ,
 NBM.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
 NBM.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            ,
 NBM.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT       ,
 NBM.DV_DEAL_ID                    ,
 NBM.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM         ,
 NBM.DV_BOOKED_DT                  ,
 NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    , /* Added part of True Demand */
 NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             ,/* Added part of True Demand */
 /* Code added as part of ICPM Q2FY14 */
 SOLTV.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
 SOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
 RP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID
 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE NBM
 INNER JOIN     $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN                  RP
 ON (      NBM.PRODUCT_KEY             = RP.ITEM_KEY                            )
 /*INNER JOIN COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY          MSFH   
 ON(RP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID= MSFH .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID)*/
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC MDHA
 /* ON RP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID= MDHA .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID */
 ON MDHA.ITEM_KEY = RP.ITEM_KEY
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_PERIOD_CNTL WISBPC
 ON(NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=WISBPC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT)
 
 /* Code added as part of ICPM Q2FY14 */
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 
 WHERE    
 MDHA.DV_PRDT_SUB_GRP_ALLOC_SRC_CD  = 'SPA'
 AND NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG  ='Y'
 AND RP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE     = 'SERVICE'
 AND MDHA .BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID = 'TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES'
 
 
 UNION
 
 SELECT 
 NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          ,
 NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 NBM.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 NBM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               ,
 NBM.AR_TRX_KEY                    ,
 NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
 NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 NBM.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
 NBM.TRANSACTION_DATETIME          ,
 NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 NBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
 NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         ,
 NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     ,
 NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  ,
 NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       ,
 NBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
 NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
 NBM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        ,
 NBM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE           ,
 NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE               ,
 NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  ,
 NBM.CANCELLED_FLG                 ,
 NBM.CANCEL_CODE                   ,
 NBM.ACQUISITION_FLG               ,
 NBM.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           ,
 NBM.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG        ,
 NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        ,
 NBM.OVERLAY_FLG                   ,
 NBM.IC_REVENUE_FLG                ,
 NBM.CHARGES_FLG                   ,
 NBM.SALESREP_FLG                  ,
 NBM.MISC_FLG                      ,
 NBM.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
 NBM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG        ,
 NBM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG          ,
 NBM.REVENUE_FLG                   ,
 NBM.RMA_FLG                       ,
 NBM.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE                  ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE   ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE  ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE        ,
 NBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE          ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE   ,
 NBM.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE     ,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE ,
 NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT        ,
 NBM.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 NBM.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 NBM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
 NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
 NBM.CONVERSION_RT                 ,
 NBM.CONVERSION_DT                 ,
 NBM.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT           ,
 NBM.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM           ,
 NBM.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE  ,
 NBM.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD  ,
 NBM.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD            ,
 NBM.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE           ,
 NBM.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY          ,
 NBM.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
 NBM.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            ,
 NBM.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT       ,
 NBM.DV_DEAL_ID                    ,
 NBM.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM         ,
 NBM.DV_BOOKED_DT                  ,
 NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    , /* Added part of True Demand */
 NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             ,/* Added part of True Demand */
 /* Code added as part of ICPM Q2FY14 */
 SOLTV.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
 SOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
 RP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID
 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE NBM
 INNER JOIN     $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN                  RP
 ON (      NBM.PRODUCT_KEY             = RP.ITEM_KEY                            )
 /*INNER JOIN COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY          MSFH   
 ON(RP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID= MSFH .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID)*/
 
 /***Fixed as Part of combined Services Normalization :This Join Condition was missed in initial version*****/
 
/* INNER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SO_LINE_LINK MDSL
 ON 
     NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=MDSL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
 AND RP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID= MDSL .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
 
 INNER JOIN COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC MDHA
 ON   MDSL.CS_DEAL_PRDT_SUB_GROUP_ID=MDHA .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
 AND  MDSL.APPROVED_DEAL_ID=MDHA.APPROVED_DEAL_ID */
 /* COMMENTED AS PART OF SFH DECOUPLING */ 
 
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC MDHA
  /* ON RP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID= MDHA .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID */
  ON MDHA.ITEM_KEY = RP.ITEM_KEY
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_PERIOD_CNTL WISBPC
 ON(NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=WISBPC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT)
 /* Code added as part of ICPM Q2FY14 */
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV  ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
 WHERE    
 MDHA.DV_PRDT_SUB_GRP_ALLOC_SRC_CD  = 'MDM'
 AND NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG  ='Y'
 AND RP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE     = 'SERVICE'
 AND MDHA .BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID = 'TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES'
